findings.description: The production configuration XML example showing OracleSequenceIdGenerator with 4 idTable entries (ID1–ID4 mapped to SEQ_1–SEQ_4) is omitted. The source introduces it with 「この例では、下記のように本番用の設定ファイルにシーケンスオブジェクトの採番定義がされているとする。」 and provides the full XML. This 'before' configuration is context for understanding what the test config replaces, and the key mapping values (e.g., entry key="1101") used in the Excel examples are only explained in this production config block.
findings.source_evidence:
<!-- シーケンスオブジェクトを使用した採番設定 -->
<component name="idGenerator" class="nablarch.common.idgenerator.OracleSequenceIdGenerator">
    <property name="idTable">
        <map>
            <entry key="1101" value="SEQ_1"/>
            ...
        </map>
    </property>
</component>

findings.description: The Java test code example (UserUpdateActionRequestTest.testRW11AC0301Normal) demonstrating how to call assertObjectPropertyEquals within a test method is omitted. The example shows the full usage pattern: executing a request with BasicAdvice, retrieving a form from ExecutionContext via getRequestScopedVar, and calling assertObjectPropertyEquals. Only the method signatures and Excel example are included in the knowledge file.

The source file is cut off at the end with an unreferenced anchor `.. _how_to_change_test_data_dir:` and the beginning of its heading underline, indicating at least one more section (likely about changing the test data directory) exists in the full source file. This section is absent from the knowledge file (which ends at s11). If the full source contains content for that section, it would be missing from the knowledge file.
